response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities, though her lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and limited German proficiency are minor concerns.
strengths: Proven full-stack ownership across frontend (React, Ember) and backend (Node.js, DLang)
Direct experience with AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Strong testing and DevOps culture with Docker, CI/CD, and GitLab
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in stack
Limited German language proficiency may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
Diverse but fragmented history raises questions about depth in modern enterprise tooling
